summary: M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 is CLOSED after PR #129 passed required CI, merged into origin/main at 4aef9108da1e659354a4a726b07b4b6dad56f966, and local main synchronized. The next READY M6 task is M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001.

decisions: Close M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 only after PR #129 entered main and local main matched origin/main.
Start M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 next with gameplay_designer writer and systems_architect review.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE: no manual node battle implementation or blocking M6/M7/M8 spike/research task is authorized.
risks: M6 downstream tasks are broad and several are R4; each requires its own writer/reviewer gates.
M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 is a contract task, not authorization to skip downstream implementation reviews.
requested_action: Merge this closure checkpoint, sync main, then start M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001.
